'''ngasodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbling|rabbling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbling|rabbling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngasodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæsedeth|ngæsedeth]] || [[word:ngæsedej|ngæsedej]] || [[word:ngæsedesh|ngæsedesh]] || [[word:ngæsede|ngæsede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngasosodoth|ngasosodoth]] || [[word:ngasosodoj|ngasosodoj]] || [[word:ngasosodosh|ngasosodosh]] || [[word:ngasosodo|ngasosodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngasodoth|ngasodoth]] || [[word:ngasodoj|ngasodoj]] || [[word:ngasodosh|ngasodosh]] || [[word:ngasodo|ngasodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngasofdoth|ngasofdoth]] || [[word:ngasofdoj|ngasofdoj]] || [[word:ngasofdosh|ngasofdosh]] || [[word:ngasofdof|ngasofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngasodotho|ngasodotho]] || [[word:ngasodojo|ngasodojo]] || [[word:ngasodosho|ngasodosho]] || [[word:ngasodoko|ngasodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngasodoth|ngasodoth]] || [[word:ngasodoj|ngasodoj]] || [[word:ngasodosh|ngasodosh]] || [[word:ngasodo|ngasodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngasodothol|ngasodothol]] || [[word:ngasodojol|ngasodojol]] || [[word:ngasodoshol|ngasodoshol]] || [[word:ngasodokol|ngasodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngasodothotho|ngasodothotho]] || [[word:ngasodojojo|ngasodojojo]] || [[word:ngasodoshosho|ngasodoshosho]] || [[word:ngasodoko|ngasodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngasodothon|ngasodothon]] || [[word:ngasodojon|ngasodojon]] || [[word:ngasodoshon|ngasodoshon]] || [[word:ngasodokon|ngasodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngasodothoro|ngasodothoro]] || [[word:ngasodojoro|ngasodojoro]] || [[word:ngasodoshoro|ngasodoshoro]] || [[word:ngasodokoro|ngasodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
